description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Universal-Updater that triggers on push to all branches except translation, on pull requests to any branch, and on release creation. The workflow uses an ubuntu-latest environment with a devkitpro/devkitarm container to build Universal-Updater, install required tools, and prepare artifacts. It then publishes the build to GitHub Actions and optionally to the Universal-Team/extras repository, and sends a Discord webhook on success or failure.
